resumes.skill_based_summary: Research psychologist with advanced quantitative and qualitative skills. Self-taught R during my postdoc (took about 6 months of evenings and weekends - Stack Overflow was my best friend). I'm expert in SPSS (15+ years) and advanced in R (5 years), intermediate in Python (still learning). I've conducted 500+ hours of clinical interviews and trained 20+ research assistants. My statistical skills include multilevel modeling, SEM, and longitudinal analysis. Looking for a position where I can use my methodological expertise while continuing to develop my programming skills.

resumes.skill_based_summary: Urban sociologist with strong qualitative skills and intermediate quantitative abilities. My strength is ethnography - I've spent 3+ years in the field across 4 cities. I'm less confident in statistics (self-taught what I needed for mixed methods). I use NVivo for qualitative analysis and Stata for basic quant. I've trained 15+ research assistants in ethnographic methods. Looking for a position where my qualitative expertise is valued while I continue developing my quantitative skills.

resumes.skill_based_summary: Linguistic anthropologist specializing in language documentation and sociolinguistics. I speak 4 languages (English, Spanish, Quechua, Portuguese) at varying levels. My technical skills include phonetic analysis (Praat), transcription (ELAN, CLAN), and corpus linguistics. I've documented 3 endangered languages over 8 years of fieldwork. Self-taught in computational methods (still learning Python for NLP). Looking for a position where I can combine language documentation with computational linguistics.

resumes.skill_based_summary: Development economist with expertise in econometric analysis, causal inference, and large-scale randomized controlled trials. Advanced proficiency in Stata, R, and Python. Expert in panel data methods, instrumental variables, difference-in-differences, and regression discontinuity designs. Published extensively in top economics journals. Seeking senior research position.
